comment.body: high vol causes dealer hedging flows to stabilize price action, making it more difficult for the price to drop below zero vanna. As vol decreases, these supportive flows weaken, making it easier for the price to move lower. I think.
comment.raw_body: high vol causes dealer hedging flows to stabilize price action, making it more difficult for the price to drop below zero vanna. As vol decreases, these supportive flows weaken, making it easier for the price to move lower. I think.
